title: AI Foundations for Product Managers
subtitle: From AI literacy to shipping your own MVP
description: A 16-day intensive program designed for Product Managers who want to master AI tools, lead product discovery, build MVPs with vibe coding, and launch growth-ready products.

phases.title: Phase 1: AI Foundations for Product Managers

days.title: AI Fundamentals for PMs
days.description: Learn how Generative AI, LLMs, and modern AI assistants work, their capabilities, limitations, and how they are transforming the Product Manager role.

days.title: AI Tool Stack for PMs
days.description: Explore the essential AI tools used for research, content creation, analysis, documentation, and productivity, and understand when to use each tool effectively.
topics: Choosing the right AI tool for the right task

days.title: Product Management Fundamentals
days.description: Build a strong foundation in product management, including product lifecycle, customer-centric thinking, problem-solving, stakeholder management, and product ownership.
days.assignment: Build your personal AI PM Workspace

days.title: Idea Generation & Market Research
days.description: Use AI to identify market opportunities, discover customer problems, analyze competitors, and validate product ideas faster.

days.title: Customer Discovery
days.description: Learn how to create personas, map customer journeys, identify pain points, and understand customer needs using AI-assisted research techniques.

days.title: MVP & Product-Market Fit
days.description: Understand how to define a Minimum Viable Product, prioritize features, validate assumptions, and establish product-market fit.

days.title: PRDs & User Stories
days.description: Create professional Product Requirement Documents, user stories, acceptance criteria, and feature specifications using AI as a co-pilot.

days.title: Roadmaps & Product Strategy
days.description: Learn how to prioritize initiatives, define success metrics, create product roadmaps, and align product decisions with business goals.

days.title: Technology Foundations for PMs
days.description: Gain a practical understanding of frontend, backend, APIs, databases, authentication, cloud platforms, and how modern applications are built.

days.title: Vibe Coding Fundamentals
days.description: Learn how to convert product ideas and requirements into working software using AI-assisted development tools without extensive coding knowledge.

days.title: Building MVP – User Experience & Frontend
days.description: Create wireframes, user flows, landing pages, and application interfaces using AI-powered design and development platforms.

days.title: Building MVP – Backend & Integrations
days.description: Build application logic, connect databases, implement authentication, and integrate third-party services using AI development tools.

days.title: Testing & Iteration
days.description: Validate product functionality, perform user testing, gather feedback, identify issues, and refine the MVP before launch.

days.title: Product Launch
days.description: Prepare the product for market by defining positioning, messaging, onboarding experiences, and launch strategies.

days.title: Product Analytics & Growth
days.description: Learn how to measure product performance, analyze user behavior, track key metrics, and identify growth opportunities.

days.title: Capstone Demo Day
days.description: Present a complete product journey from idea to MVP, demonstrate the working solution, and receive structured feedback for future improvements.

audiences.description: 8-day student-friendly program for Classes 6–12 - fun and project-based.
10-day program - APIs, RAG, agents, and portfolio-ready projects.
16-day AI-first program for Product Managers - from fundamentals to MVP launch and capstone demo.

paid.title: Full 16-Day PM Program
items: AI tool stack & vibe coding workshops
